rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO MARIN COUNTY** CONS. OF DONALD PAUL LERA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/14/20. No earlier date available. No courtesy copy. [LRSF 2.7 B.] Courtesy copies must be received by the assigned Examiner no later than 4/7/20. The accounting period exceeds the number of years permitted by this Court. [LRSF 14.59.] If the conservator was aware as early as 2010 (as reported by the Court Investigator) that the estate exceeded the amount for waived accountings under Probate Code Section 2628, she was delinquent in filing her accounting(s). [Probate Code Section 2628(c).] Additionally, if the estate exceeded the amount for waived accountings, deferred assessment fees must be paid. An appearance will likely be required after the accounting petition is reviewed.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF TREVOR BRICE SPARKMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/14/20. (No earlier date available.) The amended petition was filed on 3/3/20, which was not at least 15 days before this hearing. [CRC 7.53(a).] It is not entirely clear why an amended petition was filed, when only supplemental information was provided in the amended petition and the accounting itself was not otherwise amendeded. A courtesy copy of the proof of service of notice of the 4/14/20 must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 4/7/20. (A Notice of Hearing should list in item 1 only the FILED papers to be heard; a proposed order is not a filed pleading.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANDREA CIBRIAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing; however, estate administration will only be allowed to continue until September. Status of closing the estate is set for 9/15/20. If a petition for final distribution or a second report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration is not filed by 9/8/20, an appearance will be required on 9/15/20. (The correct Code section is 12201(b) for notice of a petition filed under Section 12200. The identification of the party on the fist page of a pleading must show the representative capacity of a fiduciary, not just "Petitioner." [LRSF 14.17.] The petitioner is not a "plaintiff.")
